title: HLStyle - Armors & GUIs
description: Restyling outdated textures, the HLS way
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5150388381aa2d88563728687acb0690898fa9e.png)


**HLStyle** is a resource pack with the sole purpose of making more unique textures for various areas of the game, by default it also includes various mod compats such as,

Armor:


- Simply Steel,

- Copperized

- Additional Additions

![Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/903df615a62bc7b36726c8dcbb632b93d63da47b.png)
 

GUI:


- Farmer's Delight

- Farmer's Respite

- Woodworks

- Clayworks

- Nock Enough Arrows

- Aether

- HLSpells


![GUIs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b318c1559dd3c1fbbfee9dc276ef8dc2f4d95cb4.png)
